description: B-Gaming S.A. develops technological solutions for capturing, communicating, validating, and processing large volumes of information. The company also installs security computer centers, communication networks and equipment, VSAT antennas, online and mobile lottery terminals, printers, and other supplies. In addition, it develops communication and transaction management software. The company was formerly known as Boldt Gaming S.A. and changed its name to B-Gaming S.A. in February 2018. B-Gaming S.A. was incorporated in 1934 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
